entries.source: "Check my essay thesis"
entries.value: "Kagua nadharia ya insha yangu"

entries.source: "Give me a hint for this physics problem"
entries.value: "Nipe dokezo kwa tatizo hili la fizikia"

entries.source: "Help me start this word problem"
entries.value: "Nisaidie kuanza tatizo hili la maneno"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Homework Coach on inspir for practice learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Mwongozo wa vitendo wa kutumia Homework Coach kwenye inspir kwa kujifunza mazoezi, ukiwa na vidokezo, mizunguko ya masomo, na tabia salama zaidi za AI.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Mzunguko imara zaidi wa kusoma

entries.source: AI Homework Coach With Hints, Not Answer Dumping is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Get unstuck on homework with hints, examples, and checks that help you do the thinking yourself.
entries.value: Kocha wa Kazi za Nyumbani wa AI Mwenye Vidokezo, Si Kumwaga Majibu ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: ondoa kukwama kwenye kazi za nyumbani kwa vidokezo, mifano, na ukaguzi unaokusaidia kufikiri mwenyewe.

entries.source: AI Homework Coach With Hints, Not Answer Dumping: practical guide
entries.value: AI Homework Coach With Hints, Not Answer Dumping: mwongozo wa vitendo

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Mkufunzi wa AI

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Omba hatua ndogo ya kwanza badala ya jibu la mwisho.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Iombe AI ikague mantiki yako, si matokeo tu.

entries.source: Find the next step.
entries.value: Tafuta hatua inayofuata.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Malizia kwa kuandika wazo tena kutoka kumbukumbu.

entries.source: Homework Coach
entries.value: Kocha wa Kazi ya Nyumbani

entries.source: Practice
entries.value: Zoezi

entries.source: Practice a similar problem.
entries.value: Fanya mazoezi ya tatizo linalofanana.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Vidokezo vya kujaribu

entries.source: Start the live mode at Homework Coach. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Math Step Coach. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Anza hali ya moja kwa moja kwenye Homework Coach. Ikiwa unataka muundo wa kujifunza unaokaribiana, jaribu Math Step Coach. Kwa mtazamo mpana zaidi wa jukwaa, soma kile ambacho mwenzi wa kujifunza wa AI anapaswa kufanya kwa kila mtu.

entries.source: Students who need help starting a problem, checking work, or understanding a mistake.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaohitaji msaada kuanza tatizo, kukagua kazi, au kuelewa kosa.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Iambie hali unachojaribu kujifunza au kutengeneza.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Tofauti hiyo huonekana katika mtiririko. Badala ya jibu moja kubwa, vipindi bora hupitia mzunguko: weka lengo, jaribu kitu, pata mrejesho, rekebisha sehemu dhaifu, na chagua hatua inayofuata.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Mkazo huo ni muhimu. Chatbot ya jumla inaweza kujibu karibu chochote, lakini hali ya kujifunza huipa mazungumzo umbo. Hukuelekeza kwenye aina ya kufikiri, mazoezi, mrejesho, au uchunguzi unaosaidia wazo kushikamana.

entries.source: The coach supports your thinking without taking over the assignment, so the final work stays yours.
entries.value: Mkufunzi anasaidia fikra zako bila kuchukua jukumu la kazi hiyo, ili kazi ya mwisho ibaki kuwa yako.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Hii ndiyo tabia ile ile iliyo nyuma ya kusoma kwa AI bila kujidanganya: mfanye mwanafunzi abaki hai. AI ina manufaa zaidi inapokupa mrejesho kuhusu kufikiri kwako.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Hali hii ina manufaa hasa kwa wanafunzi wanaotaka:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Jaribu hatua kwa maneno yako mwenyewe.

entries.source: Understand the mistake.
entries.value: Elewa kosa.

entries.source: Use Homework Coach when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Tumia Homework Coach unapotaka kipindi kinachoanza haraka lakini bado kinajirekebisha kulingana nawe. Lengo la kwanza si kusikika wa kuvutia. Lengo la kwanza ni kufanya hatua inayofuata ihisi inawezekana.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Hali hii husaidia nini

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Pa kwenda baadaye

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Unaweza pia kuanza na toleo lisilo kamili la tatizo lako halisi. Kidokezo cha kwanza kisicho safi ni sawa. Kipindi kinaweza kufafanua kiwango, hadhira, muda wa mwisho, na mtindo mara tu unapoanza.
